title: Eyewear with internal channels
abstract: This invention discloses an eyewear frame with internal channels. Internal channels are configured for specific designs and filled with substances. Substances may be cured after filling, or may remain a fluid and be changed out to change the final design.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An eyewear frame comprising: a frame body comprising at least one lens portion; wherein the frame body further comprises a first internal channel, a first internal channel inlet, and a first internal channel outlet, wherein the first internal channel is configured to receive an injection of a fluid substance through the first channel inlet, and wherein the first channel outlet is configured to provide egress for air in the first internal channel when the injection of the fluid substance is received through the first channel inlet into the first internal channel. 2. The eyewear frame of claim 1, wherein the first internal channel is designed to display a message. 3. The eyewear frame of claim 1, wherein the first internal channel is designed to display a decorative design. 4. The eyewear frame of claim 1, wherein the frame is made of transparent material. 5. The eyewear frame of claim 1, wherein the frame is made of translucent material. 6. The eyewear frame of claim 1, wherein the at least one lens portion comprises a first lens portion and a second lens portion coupled by a bridge portion, and further comprising a first temple piece operatively coupled to the first lens portion; and a second temple piece operatively coupled to the second lens portion. 7. The eyewear frame of claim 6, wherein the first temple piece and the second temple piece are integrally coupled to the first lens portion and the second lens portion. 8. The eyewear frame of claim 6, wherein the first temple piece and the second temple piece are coupled to the first lens portion and the second lens portion by hinges. 9. The eyewear frame of claim 6, wherein at least one of the first and second temple piece has at least one internal channel. 10. The eyewear frame of claim 9, wherein the at least one internal channel is filled with a substance. 11. The eyewear frame of claim 10, wherein the substance is a fluid. 12. The eyewear frame of claim 11, wherein the substance is cured. 13. The eyewear frame of claim 11, wherein the substance remains a fluid. 14. The eyewear frame of claim 1, further comprising at least one substance filled into the first internal channel. 15. The eyewear frame of claim 14, wherein the at least one substance is provided in fluid form. 16. The eyewear frame of claim 15, wherein the at least one substance is cured after filling into the first internal channel. 17. The eyewear frame of claim 16, wherein the at least one substance enhances the frame's structural strength. 18. The eyewear frame of claim 15, wherein the at least one substance remains in fluid form after filling into the first internal channel. 19. The eyewear frame of claim 14, wherein the at least one substance is replaceable with another substance. 20. The eyewear frame of claim 14, wherein the at least one substance is temperature stable. 21. The eyewear frame of claim 14, wherein the at least one substance is nondegradable. 22. The eyewear frame of claim 1, comprising more than one internal channels. 23. The eyewear frame of claim 22, wherein the more than one internal channels are filled with different substances. 24. The eyewear frame of claim 23, wherein the different substances have different colors. 25. A method to modify an eyewear frame comprising: providing at least one internal channel inside the eyewear frame; and filling the at least one internal channel with a substance; wherein the frame is made of transparent or translucent material, wherein the at least one internal channel has an inlet configured to receive an injection of a fluid substance, and wherein the at least one internal channel has an outlet configured to provide egress for air. 26. The method of claim 25, further comprising curing the substance. 27. The method of claim 25, further comprising replacing the substance with another substance. 28. The method of claim 25, wherein the substance is non-degradable. 29. The method of claim 25, wherein different internal channels are filled with different substances. 30. The method of claim 25, wherein the at least one channel is configured to display a message. 31. The method of claim 25, wherein the at least one channel is configured to display a design.
